goals: 生成结构合理的 OpenClaw AgentSkill
把超长 SKILL.md 拆到 references
提升 description 触发质量
common_constraints: Prefer progressive disclosure over giant monolithic instructions
Do not auto-persist anything to OpenViking
open_questions: 是否需要在 v1 就支持 pattern-aware repair recipes?

patterns.title: description 同时写明能力与触发条件
patterns.summary: 把 skill 能做什么、什么时候该触发，统一写进 frontmatter description。

use_when: 审计 existing SKILL.md 的触发质量
avoid_when: 任务只要求修脚本内容，不涉及 skill 入口定义

example_snippets.prompt_excerpt: Audit this SKILL.md for bloat and bad trigger descriptions
example_snippets.outcome_excerpt: Refined description to include both capability and when-to-use

failure_modes: 只描述能力，不描述触发场景
把 when-to-use 写进 body 而不是 frontmatter

must_include: specific triggers or contexts for use
must_avoid: vague description like 'Use when you need help'
example_phrasings: Use when Codex needs to create, refine, audit, or restructure AgentSkills

planner_actions: reserve SKILL.md frontmatter refinement in generation order
generator_actions: emit description with ability + trigger phrasing

patterns.title: 把细节说明拆到 references
patterns.summary: 当 SKILL.md 过长或存在多变体说明时，把重内容拆到 references，并在入口文件保留导航。

use_when: 出现多个变体、领域或高级细节
avoid_when: 技能本身非常小，额外 reference 只会增加复杂度
required_repo_signals: docs or long markdown sections present

failure_modes: reference file created but not linked from SKILL.md

must_include: pointer from SKILL.md to extracted reference file
should_include: clear section title in extracted reference
brief table of contents for long reference

planner_actions: add references/*.md candidates when markdown sections are large
generator_actions: emit lightweight pointer in SKILL.md and detailed body in references

planner_defaults: Prefer SKILL.md + references/ over a monolithic SKILL.md when detail grows
generator_defaults: Keep SKILL.md lean and route to references when needed
validator_defaults: Check frontmatter quality beyond mere presence
Check that extracted references are linked
repair_defaults: Prefer deterministic fixes for frontmatter and navigation issues

reviewer_notes: Good enough for deterministic planner/validator integration

memory_candidates.title: Skill-create pattern set draft
memory_candidates.content: Trigger-description and reference-split patterns were extracted from recent skill-create cases.

examples.prompt_excerpt: Create a skill that helps audit existing SKILL.md files for bloat and bad trigger descriptions
examples.outcome_excerpt: Produced a skill scaffold with trigger-aware description guidance
